items.text: Folio3 HR Agent Hub Use Cases
AI is transforming crucial tasks in HR to minimize time taken and double down the productivity.
Transform the speed and quality of your hiring pipeline.
Use Copilot to draft role-specific job descriptions that align with market trends and internal benchmarks.
Rapidly summarize resumes to highlight top-tier talent based on specific KPIs and experience levels.
Automatically generate behavioral and technical interview questions, then summarize meeting transcripts to compare candidate performance fairly.
Draft personalized, compliant offer letters and negotiation responses in seconds.
Reduce time-to-productivity for every new hire.
Generate 30-60-90 day plans tailored to the specific department and seniority of the hire.
Use Azure-backed agents to let employees query the Employee Handbook, IT policies, and benefits documents in natural language.
Use Copilot to identify key internal stakeholders and "onboarding buddies" based on the new hire's role and project requirements.
Use Copilot to conduct instant salary benchmarking and benefits research across your industry and geography.
Instantly draft executive summaries and communication plans for changes to compensation or health plans.
Build "Ask HR" agents that resolve common benefits queries (leave balance, insurance coverage) without human intervention.
Foster a culture of continuous growth.
Map employee skill gaps to internal resources and Microsoft Learn modules.
Use Copilot to summarize feedback from multiple stakeholders, helping managers write objective, actionable performance appraisals.
Identify internal candidates for open roles based on past projects and skills logged in Azure-hosted databases.
Analyze anonymous pulse surveys with Copilot in Excel to identify trends in employee burnout or satisfaction.
Improve inclusivity with AI-generated meeting summaries, action items, and clear communication drafts for all-hands meetings.
Streamline HR ticket management by categorizing and drafting responses to common employee grievances or requests.

items.text: By implementing the full library, Folio3 helps you hit these critical benchmarks:
Reduce Cost-Per-Hire by automating 60% of administrative recruiting tasks.
Lower Attrition by identifying sentiment shifts 3 months earlier through AI analytics.
Slash Onboarding Time by providing 24/7 AI-driven support for new hires.
Boost HR Productivity by reclaiming up to 10 hours per week per HR manager.
